Continue?
ShrinkConfirmChests:
Reducing the inventory size will drop {0} item(s) from {1} chest(s) across the world, at each chest's location.

Continue?
ShrinkConfirmBoth:
Reducing the inventory size will drop:
• {0} item(s) from your inventory
• {1} item(s) from {2} chest(s) across the world

Continue?
Conflict.Oyasumi.Note: Where's Ma' Storage! sets the stack sizes; Oyasumi's 999 is ignored.
Conflict.MoreInventorySlots.Note: Both mods set the player inventory size. Whichever loads last wins - pick one.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_tag_scan_keybind.name: Tag Scan Keybind
cfg.debug_tag_scan_keybind.desc: Press this key in-game to log every world object id, custom tag and position within the scan radius. Useful for finding anchor tags. Output goes to the BepInEx console and LogOutput.log.
cfg.debug_tag_scan_radius.name: Tag Scan Radius (tiles)
cfg.debug_tag_scan_radius.desc: Radius (in tiles) to scan around the player when pressing the Tag Scan Keybind.
cfg.shared_inventory.name: Shared Inventory
cfg.shared_inventory.desc: Enable or disable shared inventory when crafting.
cfg.allow_zombies_access.name: Allow Zombies Access
cfg.allow_zombies_access.desc: Enable or disable allowing zombies access to shared inventory.
cfg.exclude_wells.name: Exclude Wells
cfg.exclude_wells.desc: Enable or disable excluding wells from shared inventory.
cfg.exclude_zombie_mill.name: Exclude Zombie Mill
cfg.exclude_zombie_mill.desc: Enable or disable excluding the zombie mill from shared inventory.
cfg.exclude_quarry.name: Exclude Quarry
cfg.exclude_quarry.desc: Enable or disable excluding the quarry from shared inventory.
cfg.sort_by_distance_from_crafter.name: Sort By Distance From Crafter
cfg.sort_by_distance_from_crafter.desc: When on, crafts pull ingredients from the closest storage first. When off, ordering follows the game zone discovery order and per-object priority - which can mean a far chest is drained before a nearby one.
cfg.modify_inventory_size.name: Modify Inventory Size
cfg.modify_inventory_size.desc: Enable or disable modifying the inventory size for the player and chests.
cfg.additional_player_inventory_space.de: Number of additional inventory spaces granted to the player (0 means vanilla size). Requires Modify Inventory Size to be on.
cfg.additional_container_inventory_space: Number of additional inventory spaces granted to chests, racks, cabinets and other shareable storage. Requires Modify Inventory Size to be on.
cfg.show_only_personal_inventory.name: Show Only Personal Inventory
cfg.dont_show_empty_rows_in_inventory.na: Dont Show Empty Rows In Inventory
cfg.dont_show_empty_rows_in_inventory.de: Enable or disable displaying empty rows in the inventory.
cfg.show_used_space_in_titles.name: Show Used Space In Titles
cfg.show_used_space_in_titles.desc: Enable or disable showing used space in inventory titles.
cfg.inventory_dimming.name: Inventory Dimming
cfg.show_world_zone_in_titles.name: Show World Zone In Titles
cfg.show_world_zone_in_titles.desc: Enable or disable showing world zone information in inventory titles.
cfg.hide_invalid_selections.name: Hide Invalid Selections
cfg.hide_invalid_selections.desc: Enable or disable hiding invalid item selections in the inventory.
cfg.remove_gaps_between_sections.name: Remove Gaps Between Sections
cfg.remove_gaps_between_sections.desc: Enable or disable removing gaps between inventory sections.
Enable or disable removing gaps between sections in the vendor inventory.
cfg.modify_stack_size.name: Modify Stack Size
cfg.modify_stack_size.desc: Enable or disable modifying the stack size of items.
cfg.stack_size_for_stackables.name: Stack Size For Stackables
cfg.stack_size_for_stackables.desc: Set the maximum stack size for stackable items.
cfg.grave_item_stacking.name: Grave Item Stacking
cfg.pen_paper_ink_stacking.name: Pen Paper Ink Stacking
cfg.pen_paper_ink_stacking.desc: Allow pen, paper, and ink items to stack.
cfg.chisel_stacking.name: Chisel Stacking
cfg.tool_stacking.name: Tool Stacking
cfg.prayer_stacking.name: Prayer Stacking
cfg.weapon_stacking.name: Weapon Stacking
cfg.equipment_stacking.name: Equipment Stacking
cfg.allow_hand_tool_destroy.name: Allow Hand Tool Destroy
cfg.allow_hand_tool_destroy.desc: Enable or disable destroying objects with hand tools.
cfg.collect_drops_on_game_load.name: Collect Drops On Game Load
cfg.collect_drops_on_game_load.desc: Enable or disable collecting drops on game load.
cfg.drop_handling_on_game_load.name: Drop Handling
cfg.drop_handling_on_game_load.desc: Where scattered loot goes when you load a save. CollectToInventory pulls everything into your pockets (overflow lands at the meditation spot). MoveNearKeepersHouse leaves your inventory alone and piles every loose item next to your house so you can sort it yourself.
cfg.near_house_dump_zone_radius.name: Near-House Dump Zone Radius (tiles)
cfg.near_house_dump_zone_radius.desc: Radius (in tiles) around the dump spot that counts as already placed. Items already inside this zone are left alone on load instead of being re-scattered. Raise this if you want a larger safe area around your house where loose items will not be touched.
cfg.player_loot_magnet_range.name: Player Loot Magnet Range (tiles)
cfg.player_loot_magnet_range.desc: How close you have to be (in tiles) for nearby loot to fly toward you and auto-pickup. Vanilla is 1.8 tiles - slide upward in 0.25-tile steps to sweep up drops from further away.
cfg.hide_stockpile_widgets.name: Hide Stockpile Widgets
cfg.hide_stockpile_widgets.desc: Enable or disable hiding stockpile widgets.
cfg.hide_tavern_widgets.name: Hide Tavern Widgets
cfg.hide_tavern_widgets.desc: Enable or disable hiding tavern widgets.
cfg.hide_soul_widgets.name: Hide Soul Widgets
cfg.hide_soul_widgets.desc: Enable or disable hiding soul widgets.
cfg.hide_warehouse_shop_widgets.name: Hide Warehouse Shop Widgets
cfg.hide_warehouse_shop_widgets.desc: Enable or disable hiding warehouse shop widgets.
cfg.hide_bag_widgets.name: Hide Bag Widgets
cfg.hide_bag_widgets.desc: Hide bags and backpacks from the inventory panel list. Open them with the right-click Open Bag menu instead. Turn this off to keep each bag expanded inline the way the mod showed them before.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
